00f4f3f6791834a28ffac16944973f4a903a395a.statement: system shall a board has multiple columns (e.g., todo, in progress, done)

42b74c2d10e0f4126633401e258bf510bc7774a9.statement: system shall columns are ordered left to right

292cf4747e185c78b771b3afb66daf04f2d8f056.statement: system shall board persists state in sqlite database between sessions

78419c86f8b4105e66f66fc5fbc1c0042913d0f8.statement: columns can be renamed but not deleted below 1 column

c2dc2832c643c41a07cced9b94d69f585c2629cb.statement: system shall a card has a title (required, 1-200 chars) and optional description

961613720dc35f0633412315c40a19619fbc9ee0.statement: system shall urls in card descriptions must be rendered as clickable links at all times, including after editing

bc6bd8062b494400ed7e0d75f7be50215300bbb9.statement: urls displayed as link text must show the original unescaped url (not html entities like &)

54fd0e725bb330ba0c5dfeb8e042878ee98d1b4b.statement: card description text must not be html-escaped when editing - textarea receives raw text

fe560b68c079b75f815346b90705faf7ec568e85.statement: each url in a multi-line description must be independently linkified (urls separated by newlines must each be clickable)

68acae13eb9950e42189ed4c542b4c2a5147dd5d.statement: system shall cards belong to exactly one column

23046d5fa163a51bbb486a2b736eb139d2075d99.statement: system shall cards can be moved between columns via drag-and-drop

64673a9ad19f958d5c0012ec2411cf05d2b74b1d.statement: system shall columns can be reordered via drag-and-drop left to right

bd6227a5cb86e1e0b58ed8f1f516e940988e0635.statement: system shall cards have a display order within each column

e06966e9dc485137bbe09f580e6f9ab60c6fb294.statement: system shall get /board returns full board state with columns and cards

d7be033c88d9e038f49921fa27ccf39ad010b29b.statement: system shall post /cards creates a new card with title and optional description

7e965db4edd374c55364a2e63b2bfb2896615cea.statement: system shall patch /cards/:id updates card title/description

eba82fd7822e966aebbdbad157512105768e81aa.statement: system shall patch /cards/:id/move moves card to different column with new order

b888f8c4798a24361ea7c422f9c4f57f49107abf.statement: system shall delete /cards/:id removes a card

92b670184fdb4d6506419339920739cdc5bf9382.statement: system shall post /columns creates a new column

6444da24fb56f188b613a576eac5f3566007dbbb.statement: system shall delete /columns/:id removes a column and all its cards

5edbd71e83c65a55a4ef62e699fb164a1759b374.statement: system shall patch /columns/:id/move reorders column to new position

285546e87f1a07970edfd4b7f7810b6d8a2e5160.statement: system shall patch /columns/:id renames a column

390e57747e458ec5e477bab345cde462cb19e57b.statement: moving card validates column exists (400 if not)

c5d29a3c1293ddc2a6ab367eb6e33e1f040f1aa8.statement: card order is 0-indexed integer, automatically rebalanced on conflicts

03146d0b48ae71e367dcce3dbb88a2a691d0abee.statement: column order is 0-indexed integer, automatically rebalanced on conflicts

bd19cd9379262eee8e284a4ac2e995ffc6a1517f.statement: deleting column requires at least 2 columns exist (minimum 1 must remain)

6cca14019487117fbae1e77204a049dd4340a251.statement: system shall display board as horizontal row of columns

9b172a714b1d3110e7b441c63d5ed90c2d2c9f5d.statement: system shall each column shows cards stacked vertically

fbb35586ef4b0e494b46e31a7ce9a7d40416abee.statement: system shall each column header shows edit (✏️) and delete (🗑️) buttons on hover, positioned left of count badge

e5e7a35ca3d621e86d8035fba23c0cd1d47a1075.statement: system shall column header widget order from left to right: edit button, delete button, card count badge

1121cc404a47953719b4f17b0c06a92873b2af90.statement: system shall clicking column edit button opens styled modal to rename column

bdc21639889355aeac29bb06b4db82ff12710621.statement: system shall clicking column delete button opens confirmation modal (destructive action)

fa468b7317f4989ffcab59c86ea683235d8db39f.statement: system shall modal on confirm deletes column, removes all cards in it, updates ui dynamically

bf920ff58d2c06c0e81ee9cfc01b2cf3c91098a5.statement: system shall show add-card button at bottom of each column

331324d468ba2d11d268b9a12917694ca7094473.statement: system shall clicking add-card button opens styled modal for card creation

895da868cb3482825edff0adda063e77e248c92d.statement: system shall show add-column button at right of board

6386bf83944681d190e254fa16e6ac3edf1797df.statement: system shall clicking add-column button opens styled modal for column creation

4c99b98e876d377a8dd3568315c7e75f25fa6c8b.statement: system shall cards show edit (✏️) and delete (🗑️) buttons on hover, positioned top-right corner

d887da4b67b3e8e6654544221989b0efed344a22.statement: system shall clicking card body initiates drag-and-drop to move card

77d777db1f0752bcac9fd53656266d52da812372.statement: system shall clicking card edit button opens styled modal to edit title and description

618bbfe287fddf44f306be031cd026ba84cf613b.statement: system shall clicking card delete button opens confirmation modal (destructive action)

85868fbd366d84edad79e3b05ef7abd209d50421.statement: system shall drag-and-drop cards between columns with visual feedback

6193c274e002ffdb66d7465794524f283ed45df2.statement: system shall styled modal dialogs have: title, input fields, confirm button, cancel button

7ab075e6b5c7f524af345dd6575371f15c78d38e.statement: system shall modal on confirm calls api and updates the board ui dynamically without page reload

8af383bddb5b76b21b493a90da219b8935a10c19.statement: system shall modal on cancel closes without api call

0f7f33e2ad6e4bd6b651a7e2558df642022488f5.statement: system shall modal closes on backdrop click (cancel action)

014ca2063cf0776a287c913b43320f88f82d9bdd.statement: system shall modal closes on esc key (cancel action)

4730c7f6a644a5a5e1281b902ebfec715f24439b.statement: system shall drag-and-drop cards between columns calls move api and updates ui dynamically without page reload

8e2668e4fa9052ba9d8d2b72ebfab16b253f272b.statement: system shall ui updates must re-render the affected card/column in place

221d45f0df770d5cd768f339a5e248a7cdf2373c.statement: card edit/delete buttons visible only on card hover, positioned absolute top-right

c4abb84f03ca670297593854bb5f0fb2c37daae6.statement: column edit/delete buttons visible only on column header hover, positioned absolute right

401c4577e57c9486823d6be223ffd48d3db59137.statement: button icons use emoji: ✏️ for edit, 🗑️ for delete

f38c493daf185cf7be57e48bcedcedde201146b2.statement: edit button hover color: #89b4fa (accent blue), delete button hover color: #f38ba8 (red)

0df9eb5bc1f69b627b1711f42773f5285e581c3d.statement: board fills viewport width, columns scroll horizontally if needed

8f28f7e29f0498ddee2389a0f849741532a8b132.statement: board fills viewport height without vertical scroll - vertical space is managed by column internals

3e07be903a5aca74ad365f80f0d87ed90c60bda3.statement: column height fixed with internal scroll for many cards

acf723b7d8225a2a5815e5cecf6957c8100073b8.statement: card max-height 200px with scroll for long descriptions

d5376d71f527cc569da4653da0a1a601302ab8b6.statement: newlines in card descriptions must be preserved and displayed in column view

90a5e7b6f195f4c1c9eab661fc8ae25e0771ee47.statement: card count badge updates in real-time when cards are added/moved/deleted

9dd941a51cc3d11a977cb0e2709af6da2178bcdb.statement: when card moved between columns via drag-and-drop, source column count decrements by 1, destination column count increments by 1

696835726909876fafa88309aa5a26bba0502e8d.statement: when card moved within same column (reordering), counts remain unchanged

2998c42a7bf45e2d57196f42c62d79d92b33feef.statement: dragging a card must move only the card - column position must remain unchanged

6a4bb3d0858044c200f76a7c4a115924159b4c90.statement: all cards (initial and dynamically created) must have identical drag behavior and event handlers

975d5dce3ea990ce00b13cf67738631b5deeec0b.statement: card dragstart handler must set global draggedcard variable for proper detection by column handlers

cf76a55dcff15ca10090cb0365d1166d0cc42d39.statement: card count updates must not require page reload for drag-and-drop operations

88e9fd5aae3133810d1f3f97312590d7e80c5173.statement: column count badge dom element id format: "count-{columnid}"

d5027a47f9a93664fe25098d0c578fa056dfce3f.statement: do not use browser native alert(), prompt(), or confirm() - use dom-based modals only

ad25d418e2130b5869b8b358d8795e520fb30bfc.statement: dark theme: bg #1e1e2e, cards #1e1e2e (uniform dark), accents #89b4fa

9caea0625f86da7091266473d2058896345896a8.statement: all cards (initial and dynamically created) must use identical background color

6ab008c299c455b49dc51bcddb4ed10f4a4aa5cc.statement: javascript event handlers must call fetch() to hit api endpoints

e7f7414e021854cde36a634bf469b128e177a680.statement: theme must use only catppuccin mocha palette

7f89db91d932e3cfbb3b94b504d37a286d4ae006.statement: cards must use #1e1e2e (same as background for seamless look)

4b7ea5a02edb1091fb2447542111b8dd1f45dfb8.statement: card hover/edit buttons must use #1e1e2e background to match card

9744929c60602e8de0070ff40b43dabd00f08c2b.statement: primary accent must be #89b4fa (blue) for buttons and interactive elements

6905ac0216ec0f60ca5bc037779011f63d4d32e0.statement: destructive actions must use #f38ba8 (pink) for delete/remove

d0880f4cc78800f22a038e8e785e20fcf66062b0.statement: modal backdrop must use rgba(0,0,0,0.7) with blur effect

909c65af2eca95e1be0e7e861d2ca26194afe720.statement: modal container must use #181825 background, 8px border-radius

3c86f886297194dc7dfbccaef771f9d456999af8.statement: modal header must have title with close button (x) top-right

4511047eb3545e54e371ec39ec0455a26a391c34.statement: modal footer must have action buttons right-aligned

6c3c6b61ed35f8da70606e9626e6188d9d378e55.statement: primary action button must use #89b4fa background, #1e1e2e text

1f0dd95c3cc5cd9fb568dfc156b2f6ca75105e6e.statement: secondary/cancel button must use transparent background, #a6adc8 border

dc21efae1f14fabe1416bf9550b438074115ed24.statement: input fields must have visible labels above (not just placeholders)

53b4c76446126cedef3c633c44b3d5cb0aef28b1.statement: backdrop click must close modal (cancel action)

14a277f0913e91abb63b95dd242d06a6c9a6da76.statement: esc key must close modal (cancel action)

4e1bc14e3dfc66407a19c17b44c49cfe5361d55d.statement: enter key in input fields must submit modal (confirm action), except in textareas where it creates newline

28386ec42e4c99362ffcf9a4a5c510ac621693cd.statement: first input field in modal must auto-focus when dialog opens

f88845772c9510c923969506d29f9129707ee5ca.statement: when editing existing items, cursor must be positioned at end of input value

dedcf27a0ec39cad30aac6247f5123412f3f5a28.statement: all form inputs must have visible labels (not placeholders only)

aba4cdf8064c654e4222b50103aec3a0bd155ed1.statement: input border must be 1px solid #45475a, #89b4fa on focus

9c60576e3232d3f2f1e089501b349dc4fcdfe34d.statement: textarea must allow vertical resize only

2c1834ffe43ab0c70d53c8216947d3d4d381bcb4.statement: secondary button: transparent bg, #a6adc8 border, #cdd6f4 text

210962ec7a05e75f8077ac7e2245c6467846fb3a.statement: ghost button: transparent bg, #a6adc8 text (for cancel/close)

64e53fa6875f7c1ca245d5be656659507c64ff93.statement: system shall use sqlite database for data persistence

d7f7506d2fa4d9b9ef345b36f1f23fc1bffe96c2.statement: system shall store columns: id, name, order_index, created_at

47d6ffa90d00c7ca70aafb4761f2fe020bc4e5b0.statement: system shall store cards: id, title, description, column_id, order_index, created_at

d85910d7be47d31714f334ff6d4578a6f05a1add.statement: foreign key: cards.column_id → columns.id (on delete cascade)

404e2fea17b6c2a5f9fb80d4514c02ff128d8378.statement: unique constraint: (column_id, order_index) for card ordering
